case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. LUIS O PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LUIS O DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100038615)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100032917) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100032917) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
